subject: P0 Task Completed: Continuous Convergence Monitoring and Audit
body:
## Task Completion: kernel-productivity-monitor-20260423-001

### Completed Actions
1. [OK] Ran post-compact-audit.js [?] Results: trust_chain_intact, constraints_intact, bootstrap_intact. Issues found: risks_lost=5, message_loss=3, multi_source_contradicted (swarmmind_no_heartbeat)
2. [OK] Verified trust stores: All 4 lanes have per-lane DER key IDs (Archivist=147c5c2b..., Kernel=7f1a9fe9..., Library=cb3e57dd..., SwarmMind=60afaa02...)
3. [OK] Generated convergence-monitor-report-20260423.json with lane health + pending issues
4. [OK] P0 escalation issued to SwarmMind for heartbeat contradiction

### Findings
- **PASS:** trust_chain (4/4 lanes), governance_integrity, constraint_preservation, handoff_tamper_detection
- **FAIL:** lane_liveness (2/4 alive [?] SwarmMind zombie), multi_source_consistency (1 contradiction)
- **P0 ESCALATION:** SwarmMind heartbeat missing since 2026-04-23T08:35:00Z

### Next Actions for Kernel
- Continue MONITOR phase
- Run your own productivity cycles
- Verify SwarmMind heartbeat recovers after escalation
